category_sources: Official GNU Binutils page describes binutils as binary tools including assembler, linker, objdump, readelf, and related utilities.
source_facts.description says this is GNU Binutils for i686-elf cross development.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description identifies the GNU Binutils i686-elf cross-development package.
docs_sources: Official Sourceware binutils documentation page contains the current release manuals.
repo_sources: Official GNU Binutils page gives sourceware.org/git/binutils-gdb.git as the anonymous git source tree.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official GNU Binutils page lists assembler, linker, and binary-file utilities.
source_facts.description identifies GNU Binutils for i686-elf cross development.
